description:
This package strips all components out of the upstream NVidia driver package except the following:

- Display.Driver
- Display.Optimus
- PhysX
- HDAudio
- USB-C driver

#### Package Parameters
The following package parameters can be set to enable optional display components:

 * `/DCH` - Install the DCH version of the driver.
 * `/NV3DVision` - Install 3DVision driver. Note: official support has been dropped.

These parameters can be passed to the installer with the use of `--params`.
For example: `--params "'/DCH /NV3DVision'"`.

For DCH, please use the package parameter /dch
`choco feature enable -n=useRememberedArgumentsForUpgrades`
`cinst nvidia-display-driver --package-parameters="'/dch'"`

If you need support for non display related components (Shield, Geforce Experience, ...), install the unaltered `geforce-game-ready-driver` instead.
author: NVIDIA
